debug_info.goal:
Balanced : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₀ : ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))), Balanced s ↔ ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, A ≠ B → ∃ C ∈ s, dist A C = dist B C
center_free : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₁ :
  ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))),
    center_free s ↔
      ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, ∀ C ∈ s, A ≠ B ∧ B ≠ C ∧ A ≠ C → ¬∃ P ∈ s, dist P A = dist P B ∧ dist P B = dist P C
⊢ (∀ n ≥ 3, ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ s.card = n) ∧
    {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ center_free s ∧ s.card = n} = {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ Odd n}

failed_attempts:
constructor
  · -- Part (a): balanced sets exist for all n ≥ 3
    exact fun n hn => balanced_exists_all n hn Balanced hb₀
  · -- Part (b): characterization of n for balanced center-free sets
    ext n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · -- (⊆) If balanced center-free set of size n exists with n ≥ 3, then n is odd
      rintro ⟨hn3, s, hbal_s, hcf_s, hcard⟩
      exact ⟨hn3, hcard ▸ balanced_center_free_odd s (hcard ▸ hn3)
        ((hb₀ s).mp hbal_s) ((hb₁ s).mp hcf_s)⟩
    · -- (⊇) If n ≥ 3 and odd, then balanced center-free set of size n exists
      rintro ⟨hn3, hodd⟩
      refine ⟨hn3, regNgon n, (hb₀ _).mpr (regNgon_balanced n hn3 hodd),
        (hb₁ _).mpr (regNgon_center_free n hn3), regNgon_card n (by omega)⟩
